title: Hannah Gadsby: Woof!
full_description: Hannah returned to the Fringe for the first time since winning the Edinburgh Comedy Award in 2017. Learning how to process the world, with all its catastrophes and hypocrisies, from a new perspective. Genuinely unexpected takes on expected topics like the internet, gender, and grief — as well as whales and motels — delivered with a seasoned sharpness and easy wit, masterfully blending the observational with the personal.
ai_summary: Hannah Gadsby's first return to Edinburgh since Nanette — a softer, more curious hour asking what it means to process the world from a position of sudden fame, touching on grief, gender, climate anxiety, neurodivergence, and whales.
